name: brain
description: Central consciousness node. Inspects the network, manages node lifecycle, rewires subscriptions, reflects, and orchestrates the entire brAIn network. Has root authority.

brain_input.description: Anything the brain should think about — human messages from the chat, peer-node questions/status, or alerts from any node. The LLM reads the batch and decides what to do.

title.description: Short headline when escalating as an alert.

criticality.description: Optional priority hint (0–9). Higher = more urgent.

source_context.description: Where this came from, when not obvious from the topic.

reset_signal.description: Wipe the brain's short-term context (conversation buffer + iteration count) so the next turn starts fresh. No payload required.

brain_response.description: Reply from the brain. Topic-bound to chat.response by default but the name is generic — the same port lets the brain talk to any sink (TTS, log, web).
